name: everest carter
title: Software Engineer & Full-Stack Developer
tagline: Building innovative digital experiences with modern technologies. Specializing in mobile development, web applications, and blockchain solutions.
about: I'm a Software Engineer currently pursuing my Master's in Computer Science at Syracuse University. With a strong foundation in mobile and web development, I specialize in creating performant, user-centric applications that solve real-world problems. My journey spans from building enterprise Android applications at Cerence AI to leading frontend development for impactful platforms. I'm passionate about exploring emerging technologies like blockchain and AI to create innovative solutions. When I'm not coding, you'll find me participating in hackathons, contributing to open-source, or exploring the latest in tech. I believe in continuous learning and pushing the boundaries of what's possible with code.

highlights: Translated Figma prototypes into production-ready interfaces, integrating APIs and CI/CD pipelines
Designed modular, reusable UI components achieving 25% improvement in responsiveness across web and mobile platforms
Led front-end development for Yoga4Philly's platform using React.js and Angular, optimizing performance through Agile sprints
Prototyped Roku BrightScript modules for cross-platform streaming capabilities
Enhanced app functionality by 20% using OkHttp, Dagger, and Retrofit for REST API handling
Engineered Firebase and RoomDB solutions, improving real-time data retrieval by 35%
Applied MediaBrowserService for media playback integration, cutting download times by 30%
Contributed to improving app stability, reducing issue resolution time by 15% during testing cycles
Documented standard procedures and supported cross-team communication during sprints
Assisted in mobile app feature development leveraging Roku BrightScript for TV-based interfaces

projects.name: Free Flow
projects.award: ETHGlobal New York 2025 - Flow Builder Pool Prize Winner
projects.description: Free Flow transports users to an interactive 2D multiplayer virtual environment inspired by the iconic New York skyline. This project creates a gamified social space where users can explore, interact in real-time, and engage seamlessly with decentralized applications and blockchain functionalities. It bridges gaming, social platforms, and the decentralized web, offering a novel way to experience DeFi on the Flow blockchain.
features: Real-time multiplayer synchronization with Socket.io, team formation, and unique room codes
NYC skyscraper-themed interactive 2D environment with DeFi agent interaction points
AI-Powered DeFi using GOAT SDK + OpenAI for natural language blockchain interactions
Voice integration with speech recognition + ElevenLabs TTS for immersive audio
Smart contracts on Flow blockchain for secure tokenized transactions
Ambient soundscapes and NYC-themed character graphics

projects.name: AI Portfolio Copilot
projects.description: A multi-agent autonomous chatbot for personal website using Python, LangChain, and Pinecone. Features RAG architecture, real-time tool calling, and multi-agent collaboration.

contact.sponsorship: Sponsorship needed in the future after the end of STEM extension
